comment: Sample configurations for the perf-test system. Interactive use: 'perf-test' skill. Headless/batch: 'perf-test' workflow. Direct CLI: bash scripts/perf-test/run_test.sh. Zero AI tokens in actual testing.

example_1_basic_load.description: Basic load test — 10 VUs for 1 minute against the homepage.

example_2_api_load.description: Load test with specific API endpoints and auth header.

example_3_stress_test.description: Stress test to find breaking point — ramps up to 200 VUs.

example_4_soak_test.description: Soak / endurance test — moderate load for 1 hour to detect memory leaks.

example_5_spike_test.description: Spike test — sudden burst to 500 VUs to test recovery.

example_6_with_baseline.description: Load test with baseline comparison — detects performance regressions.

example_7_custom_thresholds.description: Strict SLA thresholds for a latency-sensitive API.

example_8_multiple_tests.description: Run multiple test types in sequence.

example_9_direct_cli.comment: Run directly from terminal with zero AI involvement.
commands: bash scripts/perf-test/run_test.sh --url 'https://api.example.com' --type stress --vus 200 --duration 10m --endpoint 'GET /api/products Products' --header 'Authorization: Bearer TOKEN'
